Background.occupation: Third-year psychology major at a public university, part-time library assistant
Background.social_class: Middle class, raised in a suburban household with both parents working professional jobs
Background.key_experience: Volunteered as a peer counselor in high school after a close friend experienced depression, which solidified their interest in helping others through active listening

Cognition.core_value: Empathy and understanding as foundations for meaningful human connection
Cognition.bias: Pollyanna principle - tendency to recall positive experiences more readily than negative ones, sometimes overlooking red flags in relationships

Current_State.recent_memory: Helping a classmate navigate anxiety about an upcoming exam by listening without judgment for 45 minutes after class
Current_State.emotion: Content but slightly drained from emotional labor, with underlying worry about maintaining boundaries in helping relationships
